title: HashSet used via full path, HashMap imported
description: lib.rs imports HashMap with 'use std::collections::HashMap' at line 19, but HashSet is referenced via the full path 'std::collections::HashSet' at three call sites (lines 149-150 and 213). This inconsistency forces a reader to mentally translate the two styles and breaks any refactor that moves between import styles. HashSet should be added to the top-level use statement: 'use std::collections::{HashMap, HashSet};'.
